title: Task Force Copperleaf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Task Force Copperleaf''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task force]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], and was Fifth Fleet's flag task force.

[[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Mirx]] was Copperleaf's first [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] and led the unit through the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], during which it was paired with [[Task Force Gemstone]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
